recommendations.title: Dumbo
recommendations.overview: A young elephant, whose oversized ears enable him to fly, helps save a struggling circus, but when the circus plans a new venture, Dumbo and his friends discover dark secrets beneath its shiny veneer.

recommendations.title: Curious George
recommendations.overview: When The Man in the Yellow Hat befriends Curious George in the jungle, they set off on a non-stop, fun-filled journey through the wonders of the big city toward the warmth of true friendship.

recommendations.title: The Elephant Whisperers
recommendations.overview: Bomman and Bellie, a couple in south India, devote their lives to caring for an orphaned baby elephant named Raghu, forging a family like no other.

recommendations.title: Zoo
recommendations.overview: Young Tom and his misfit friends fight to save 'Buster' the baby elephant during the German air raid bombings of Belfast in 1941.

recommendations.title: The Loud House Movie
recommendations.overview: The Loud family travel to Scotland and discover they are descendants of Scottish royalty as they move into their giant ancestral castle.

recommendations.title: George of the Jungle 2
recommendations.overview: George and Ursula now have a son, George Junior, so Ursula's mother arrives to try and take them back to "civilization".

recommendations.title: Monsters University
recommendations.overview: A look at the relationship between Mike and Sulley during their days at Monsters University — when they weren't necessarily the best of friends.

recommendations.title: George of the Jungle
recommendations.overview: Deep in the African jungle, a baby named George, the sole survivor of a plane crash, is raised by gorillas. George grows up to be a buff and lovable klutz who has a rainforest full of animal friends: Tookie, his big-beaked toucan messenger; Ape, a wi

recommendations.title: Main Krishna Hoon
recommendations.overview: In answer to an orphan boy's prayers, the divine Lord Krishna comes to Earth, befriends the boy, and helps him find a loving family.

recommendations.title: Larger Than Life
recommendations.overview: Motivational Speaker Jack Corcoran is determined to get his career off the ground, but the biggest gigs he can get are the ones nobody wants. One day, he receives a telegram that his circus clown father has passed away and left a "huge" inheritance:
